What we're going to do now is actually cut to the footage of me teaching script building live to people that we were developing a script together in a company. You'll see step by step how I use the exact tools and techniques I just talked about to take a script that was okay and make it perfect, make it seamless, make it elegant and to have it so that no matter what the skill level is of the actual sales person, the presenter himself or herself, they can take that and use it at the highest level to influence people and close everyone who's closeable. Now watch as I read this script and you're going to notice something here that I myself might stumble a bit on the words. Some of the words might not fit in the number of syllables, in other words the specific number of syllables in each sentence because this is the first draft of the call call. This isn't going to evolve over the next two days to three days until it's absolutely perfect. Every single syllable, everything flows perfectly so it sounds like music. It sounds like poetry when you're talking on the phone. What do you do if you're in the car and you put on the radio and all of a sudden the song comes on and you're like what do you do? Change the station and turn it off, right? That's what happens if you get on the phone with somebody and your tonality is slightly off. They tune you out. You need to sound exactly right. It's a very short script so we're going to go through this script. I'm going to give you one basic shot at it here and I'm going to go line by line and I'm going to go around the room and every one of us is going to get this script exactly right but we're not going home tonight. We're going to stay our whole night long for three in the morning until the script is right. Just kidding. We're going to get the script exactly right. Here's how it starts. Ready? Now, when you say down here in La Voia, California, there's a reason why it says down here in La Voia, California, which is really not correct English. What you're trying to say here is you're talking to the guy in a very familiar, friendly way. I went back and forth with this one sentence for like 30 minutes. Whether to say down here in La Voia, just to know how much attention I pay to a script because every word will increase your close rate. I went back and forth from down here in La Voia to over in La Voia to in La Voia, California. Because I know that when the right word is used, it sounds better to the person that's listening to it and you'll get to keep listening with more attention.
